name: dictionary
description: Look up English word definitions, pronunciations, synonyms, antonyms, and usage examples. Use for questions like 'define ephemeral', 'what does ubiquitous mean', 'synonym for happy', 'how do you pronounce quinoa'. The word is appended to the URL path.

input.description: The English word to look up, appended as a URL path segment (e.g. 'protocol', 'ephemeral', 'ubiquitous').

output.description: JSON array with word, phonetic transcription, audio URL, and meanings array containing part of speech, definitions, synonyms, antonyms, and example sentences.
